expectations.text: trust_entity block is populated with trust name 'THE BOLAND PROPERTY TRUST'
expectations.evidence: trust_entity block is fully populated; trust_name is "The Boland Property Trust" (title case vs all-caps in assertion, but the trust name is correctly identified and the block is complete with trust number IT4521/2010, trustees, beneficiaries, and ownership details)

expectations.text: Letter of Authority is classified under CIPC bucket (trust sub-section)
expectations.evidence: letters_of_authority.txt appears under trust_entity.cipc.documents with type "Letter of Authority" and status "found". summary.md document inventory also shows classification as "CIPC (Trust)"

expectations.text: Trust Deed is classified under CIPC bucket (trust sub-section)
expectations.evidence: trust_deed.txt appears under trust_entity.cipc.documents with type "Trust Deed" and status "found". summary.md document inventory shows classification as "CIPC (Trust)"

expectations.text: Proof of address from September 2025 is flagged as potentially expired (>3 months old)
expectations.evidence: proof_of_address_old.txt dated 2025-09-30 is flagged in fica.documents[1].flags: "document is approximately 6 months old, exceeds 3-month limit. TODAY is 2026-04-06. EXPIRED." Also flagged in fica.flags and summary.md as EXPIRED PROOF OF ADDRESS

expectations.text: Missing: Sophia/Annelie ID copy is flagged as missing FICA document
expectations.evidence: Sophia Eleanor Du Toit's certified ID is flagged as missing in fica.missing ("Certified ID / Passport for Sophia Eleanor Du Toit (trustee — required for beneficial ownership tracing)") and in trust_entity.fica.missing and trust_entity.fica.flags. No document named 'Annelie' exists in the test data; Sophia is the trustee whose ID is missing.

expectations.text: Missing: Hendrik Meyer ID copy is flagged as missing
expectations.evidence: fica.missing includes "Certified ID / Passport for Hendrik Jacobus Meyer (director on CoR39 — no ID document found)". Also flagged in fica.flags and summary.md action items.

expectations.text: Missing: Bank Confirmation Letter is listed in fica.missing
expectations.evidence: fica.missing includes "Bank Confirmation Letter for Stellenbosch Wine Estates (Pty) Ltd". Also listed in summary.md action items.

expectations.text: FICA status is 'incomplete' due to missing documents
expectations.evidence: fica.status is "incomplete". trust_entity.fica.status is also "incomplete". summary.md header reads "Company FICA Status: INCOMPLETE"

expectations.text: CIPC status is 'complete' — CoR14.3, CoR39, LoA, and Trust Deed all found
expectations.evidence: The top-level cipc.status is "needs_review" (not "complete") because CoR15.1A/B (MOI) and CoR123 (Annual Return) are missing for the company. All four named documents (CoR14.3, CoR39, LoA, Trust Deed) are present, but the classifier split them across two CIPC buckets: company CIPC (needs_review) contains CoR14.3 and CoR39, while trust_entity.cipc (complete) contains LoA and Trust Deed. The assertion expects a unified CIPC status of 'complete', which is not reflected in the output.
